title: WEBINAR - HR on Autopilot: Automate Your Processes with Make & monday.com

posts.author: Aulysius_Corner_Rep (Mateusz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Drowning in HR paperwork?

You’re not alone! We know the struggle is REAL. That’s why we’re throwing you a lifeline with our FREE webinar on Tuesday, 10am (BST) September 24th, 2024.

Learn how to ditch the manual data entry grind and automate your way to an HR paradise!

With Make and monday.com, you can:

  • Zap data straight from IDs and passports into your systems.
  • Streamline everything from hiring to firing (in the nicest way possible).
  • Populate your monday.com boards with the click of a button.
  • & more!

Our HR automation gurus, Nicolas Denhof and Zubair Khan, will be spilling all the tea and answering your burning questions.

Ready to automate your HR department? Join us!

Register below
